Notes: Goldey-Beacom extends win streak to four straight games ... Lightning defeat
Wilmington for seventh consecutive time ... Goldey-Beacom scores seasonal high
84 points ... Devonne Richardson (GBC) posts 3rd straight "double double" with
season-high 22 points ... Akilah Sewell (GBC) ties season high with 13 points.
Game.Officials: James Discher,  Paul Barksdale,  James Spingler
